Donate

Welcome to our spiritual home in Cologne

A place of worship, fellowship, and the living Word of God.

"A little one shall become a thousand, and a small one a strong nation: I the LORD will hasten it in his time." (Isaiah 60:22)

Our Journey of Faith

What began as a small prayer gathering in 1995 has blossomed into a vibrant, God-led community. Explore our history and see how the Lord transformed a humble beginning into a lasting spiritual sanctuary in Cologne.

Discover Our Story
1995

The First Gathering

A small group met for prayer, laying the foundation of our community.

Present Day

Vibrant Community

A spiritual sanctuary serving the heart of Cologne.

Our Foundation

Our faith is deeply rooted in the Holy Scriptures. We stand firm in the truth of the Gospel and the mystery of the Triune God, committed to living out our calling in Christ.

Explore Our Beliefs

Our Ministries

Youth Ministry

Our vision is to see the youth of our congregation as God-fearing and serving individuals who are fruitful in ministry and in their witness in everyday life. We focus on shaping identities in Christ through the Word and genuine Christian love.

Explore Youth Ministry

Children's Ministry

Based on Proverbs 22:6, we help children develop a personal relationship with Lord Jesus Christ. We provide a safe, holistic environment where the next generation grows in wisdom, stature, and favor with God.

Explore Children's Ministry
Give a Donation

Giving is voluntary and given with love.
